i18n_welcomeDescription: Your development tools center with terminal hacker-style interface.
i18n_selectTool: Select a tool from the sidebar to get started.
i18n_textEditorDesc: Simple and efficient text editor for your notes and code.
i18n_jsonFormatterDesc: Format and validate your JSON files easily.
i18n_aboutDescription: A collection of useful tools for developers, built with React and TypeScript.
i18n_interfaceDesc: Dark midnight-style design with terminal hacker colors for a unique experience.
i18n_performanceDesc: Built with React and TypeScript for maximum efficiency and type safety.
i18n_responsiveDesc: Works perfectly on desktop and mobile devices.
i18n_textEditorDesc: Simple and efficient text editor for your notes and code.
i18n_typeEditSave: Type, edit and save your text
i18n_jsonFormatterDesc: Format, validate and minify your JSON files easily.
i18n_insertJson: Insert your JSON and choose the desired operation
i18n_pasteJson: Paste or type your JSON here...
i18n_formatTip: Format: Adds indentation and line breaks for better readability
i18n_minifyTip: Minify: Removes spaces and line breaks to reduce size
i18n_validateTip: Validate: Checks if the JSON is syntactically correct
i18n_exampleTip: Use the "Example" button to see a demonstration JSON
